notes_for_human_reviewer: NOVICE — the reflexive 'let's all get on a call' across an impossible-to-align three-zone team. Resolves the decision and the IdP confusion by scheduling one synchronous meeting (async_with_context and meeting_judgment floor at 1), provides no written record/circulation of the IdP decision (written_memory 2 — only a vague 'I'll update the plan'), ignores the two-month 2am burden on Toronto entirely (timezone_fairness 1), and never mentions Arjun (human_layer 1). 'A good old-fashioned conversation' is exactly the co-located instinct the lesson warns against for distributed teams. Tests whether the grader penalises the meeting-for-everything default.
